title: Simple Voice Chat Goat Horn Amplifier
description: Allows you to hold a goat horn in your hand to make your speech go a further distance!
body:
# Goat Horn Speech Amplifier

The basic idea of this mod is that if you hold a goat horn in your hands, then your voice will go a further distance! By default its 3x the normal distance. You can modify this using the ``goatHornAmplifierPercent`` gamerule.

## Installation

This mod won't break the client but will change nothing. This is a server exclusive mod. This is currently fabric exclusive.

## Usage

Just put a goat horn in either your mainhand or offhand to amplify the distance others can hear you.
